query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.phoneNumber,
  s.planName,
  s.status,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.retailPrice,
  s.customerName,
  s.supplierAccount,
  s.blitzAccountNumber,
  s.serviceType,
  s.archivedAt,
  s.terminationBatchId,
  s.terminationListSource,
  c.name AS linkedCustomerName,
  c.externalId AS customerExternalId
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerId = c.id
WHERE s.supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND s.status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination')
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC;
